title: Angle-of-Impact Calculator
description: Measure a bloodstain's width and length, apply sin theta = Width / Length, and reveal the angle of impact with a live trajectory and protractor diagram.
creator: Forensic Science Intelligent Textbook
subject: Forensic Science
Bloodstain Pattern Analysis
Angle of Impact
Trigonometry
Trajectory
bloomLevel: Apply (L3) — calculate the angle of impact from bloodstain width and length.

educational.topic: Angle of impact from bloodstain width-to-length ratio
learningObjectives: Calculate the angle of impact from a bloodstain's width and length.
Explain how stain shape relates to the steepness of impact.
Connect the sin theta = W/L formula to the drop's physical trajectory.
educational.prerequisites: Basic trigonometry (sine and inverse sine); ratios

pedagogical.interactionPattern: Calculator: size the stain by dragging handles or sliders, read the W/L ratio, then press Calculate to reveal the angle and trajectory
pedagogical.assessment: Students compute sin theta = W/L and verify against the revealed angle
pedagogical.modelType: Inverse-sine angle calculation with geometric trajectory diagram
controls: drag handles on the stain edges
